points.text: Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) — FDA-approved monoclonal antibody blocking CSF-1 receptor for cancer therapy — Commercial-stage asset advancing alongside Revuforj (revumenib) menin inhibitor.
CytoDyn advanced leronlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5, with new Phase 2 data in metastatic colorectal cancer presented at AACR 2026.
Sartorius launched the CellCelector CLD, an automated imaging platform designed to accelerate monoclonal cell line development (CLD) by reducing timelines from months to approximately seven weeks.
The CellCelector CLD system yields up to 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones in four days and delivers 40% more monoclonal wells compared to standard Nanowell Plates.
Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) — Cancer (CSF-1R blockade) — FDA-approved monoclonal antibody; company advancing clinical trials across treatment continuum.

CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Metastatic Colorectal Cancer — Phase 2 study presented at AACR 2026 showed 100% CCR5 expression in 33 evaluable patients and median 70% ctDNA decline by week 2 in combination with TAS-102 and bevacizumab.
Sartorius — CellCelector CLD — Monoclonal Cell Line Development — Automated platform enables identification of up to 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones in four days with 100% transfer efficiency.

Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Commercial-stage cancer therapy advancement — Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr, anti-CSF-1R mAb) + Revuforj (revumenib) — FDA-approved assets; granted inducement stock options to 8 new employees in April 2026.

CytoDyn — Clinical-stage oncology development — Leronlimab (humanized anti-CCR5 monoclonal antibody) — Advancing Phase 2 trials in metastatic colorectal cancer and triple-negative breast cancer; presented new biomarker and clinical data at AACR 2026.

Sartorius — Accelerated monoclonal cell line development workflows — CellCelector CLD platform — Achieves 100% transfer efficiency and viability; reduces screening time to ~7 weeks with EMA 410-compliant traceability.

Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) — Mechanism: CSF-1 receptor blockade — Phase: Commercial (FDA-approved) — Population: Cancer patients — Comparator: N/A — Status: Approved therapy advancing clinical trials.

Leronlimab — Mechanism: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor to modulate tumor microenvironment and enhance immune engagement — Phase: 2 — Population: Heavily pretreated metastatic colorectal cancer patients — Comparator: Combination with TAS-102 and bevacizumab — Endpoints/Results: 100% CCR5 expression detected in 33 evaluable cases; median 70% reduction in circulating tumor DNA by week 2.

CellCelector CLD — Mechanism: High-speed automated scanning and gentle clone retrieval — Phase: Preclinical/Process Development — Population: High-producing candidate cell pools — Endpoints: 15,000 monoclonality-verified clones in 4 days; 3x higher clone outgrowth vs standard plates.
Syndax Pharmaceuticals — Employee inducement grants — 228,500 common stock options granted to 8 new hires under 2023 Inducement Plan — Vesting: 25% at 1 year, 1/48th monthly over 36 months.

Sartorius — Commercialization of automated CLD ecosystem — CellCelector CLD + Next Generation CLD Nanowell Plates — Integrated workflow combining instruments, consumables, and reagents to reduce costs and meet regulatory standards for monoclonal development.
